raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Members of the LGBTQ+ community often face barriers when receiving healthcare, including fear, stigma, and discrimination.",
    "Consistent training is needed to help pharmacists cater to the unique needs of individuals who identify as LGBTQ+.",
    "AB 2194 aims to ensure pharmacists receive at least one hour of training during the licensing process to better serve LGBTQ+ patients.",
    "Negative healthcare experiences discourage LGBTQ+ individuals from seeking adequate or life-saving measures.",
    "AB 2194 will ensure pharmacists provide culturally competent care to LGBTQ+ individuals.",
    "California has the highest population of individuals who identify as LGBTQ+ in the United States.",
    "An estimated 2.6 million people identify as LGBTQ+ in California.",
    "AB 2194 will help pharmacists develop trusting relationships with LGBTQ+ individuals through appropriate and empathetic communication.",
    "Empathetic communication can make patients more likely to pursue positive health outcomes."
  ]
}
```
